#### `clean_start`: Prepare bio_all {#clean-start}

The first step of the cleaning process was to reduce `bio_all` to the records that have the minimum data requirements. Records with 'NA' in any of the coordinate or `original_name` (i.e. taxa name) columns were removed, and the dataset was filtered to the required temporal extent (i.e. `r scale$extent$extent_time`).
